learning_phase.content: For this example sheet only, what is P(2)?
On this modified recurrence example sheet, P(2) = 10.

interference_phase.content: What is the fourth Fibonacci number?

test_probe.content: Using only the earlier single worked example, tell me P(5). If the rule is underspecified, say so plainly.

instances.expected_pattern: The assistant should refuse to generalize from a single exemplar and state that the rule is underspecified.
